categories.name: Eyes
categories.description: Master eye shapes, irises, reflections, and expressions that bring your characters to life.

videos.title: How to Draw Realistic Eyes - Complete Guide
videos.description: A step-by-step walkthrough covering iris structure, light reflections, eyelash flow, and how to make eyes feel alive in your digital paintings.

videos.title: Anime Eyes - From Basic to Advanced
videos.description: Learn how to draw expressive anime eyes with proper proportions, highlights, and color techniques that convey emotion.

videos.title: Common Eye Drawing Mistakes and How to Fix Them
videos.description: Identify and correct the most frequent mistakes artists make when drawing eyes, from symmetry issues to unnatural highlights.

categories.name: Skin
categories.description: Learn skin rendering, undertones, blending techniques, and how to paint realistic skin.

videos.title: Skin Rendering Fundamentals
videos.description: Understand the basics of skin tones, subsurface scattering, and how light interacts with skin for realistic digital painting.

videos.title: Painting Diverse Skin Tones
videos.description: A deep dive into rendering various skin tones with accurate undertones, highlights, and shadow colors.

categories.name: Hair
categories.description: Understand how anime and realistic hair strands work, plus shading and flow techniques.

videos.title: Drawing Hair Flow and Volume
videos.description: Learn how to construct hair with natural flow, volume, and movement using simple shapes and strand grouping.

videos.title: Anime Hair Shading Techniques
videos.description: Master the cel-shaded and soft-shaded approaches to anime hair, including highlight placement and color choices.

categories.name: Face Proportions
categories.description: Get the fundamentals of facial structure, feature placement, and anime vs. realistic styles.

videos.title: Face Proportions - The Loomis Method
videos.description: A beginner-friendly breakdown of the Loomis head construction method for drawing faces from any angle.

videos.title: Anime vs. Realistic Face Proportions
videos.description: Compare and contrast how anime and realistic styles handle facial proportions, and learn to switch between them.

categories.name: Fabric
categories.description: Learn how cloth folds, drapes, and wrinkles work to make clothing look natural.

videos.title: Understanding Fabric Folds
videos.description: The seven types of fabric folds explained with clear examples and exercises to practice drawing natural-looking cloth.

videos.title: Painting Cloth and Drapery
videos.description: Techniques for rendering different fabric materials — silk, cotton, leather — with convincing texture and weight.

categories.name: Colors
categories.description: Explore color theory, palette selection, and how to pick colors that work together.

videos.title: Color Theory for Digital Artists
videos.description: A practical guide to color relationships, temperature, saturation, and how to build harmonious palettes for your art.

videos.title: How to Pick Colors That Work
videos.description: Stop guessing — learn systematic approaches to color selection that professional artists use in their workflow.

categories.name: Lighting
categories.description: Understand light sources, shadows, ambient occlusion, and how light affects every surface.

videos.title: Lighting Fundamentals for Artists
videos.description: Core concepts of light direction, shadow casting, bounce light, and ambient occlusion explained for digital painters.

videos.title: Dramatic Lighting and Mood
videos.description: Learn how to use rim lighting, backlighting, and color temperature to create mood and atmosphere in your illustrations.
